en.name: SSD with TerraGroup evidence
en.description: A solid-state drive containing incriminating material. TerraGroup would likely pay handsomely for one like this. Or maybe others would.

en.name: G-Wagon flash drive
en.description: A flash drive found at the abandoned high-ranking TerraGroup staff's SUV. Contains something important, though it's unclear what exactly.

en.name: Folder with TerraGroup Labs evidence (Reports)
en.description: A folder containing documents that compromise TerraGroup Labs, focusing specifically on the organization’s project reports.

en.name: Hard drive from Rzhevsky's car
en.description: A hard drive taken from A.P.’s car. Important data may still remain on it.

en.name: City topographic intel maps
en.description: Materials that will help you better orient yourself around the area.

en.name: Lighthouse topographic intel maps
en.description: Materials that will help you better orient yourself around the area.

en.name: Nature reserve topographic intel maps
en.description: Materials that will help you better orient yourself around the area.

en.name: Customs topographic intel maps
en.description: Materials that will help you better orient yourself around the area.

en.name: Sliderkey flash drive marked with A.P.
en.description: A Sliderkey secure flash drive. These drives are commonly used by TerraGroup management. This one appears to have been used by someone with the initials "A.P.".

en.name: Factory plant topographic intel maps
en.description: Materials that will help you better orient yourself around the area.

en.name: Folder with TerraGroup evidence (Finances)
en.description: A folder containing documents that compromise TerraGroup, focusing specifically on the organization’s financial activities.

en.name: Folder with TerraGroup Labs evidence (Developments)
en.description: A folder containing documents that compromise TerraGroup Labs, focusing specifically on the organization’s developments.

en.name: Folder with TerraGroup evidence (Staff)
en.description: A folder containing documents that compromise TerraGroup, focusing specifically on the organization’s staff records.

en.name: Secure container Alpha-1 with TerraGroup evidence
en.description: A small container holding all the documents and audio tapes containing compromising material on TerraGroup. Now they’re guaranteed to reach Mr. Kerman intact.

en.name: Sacred Amulet from the mysterious room
en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.

en.name: Taran's postcard
en.description: On the back of the postcard, someone wrote: "Love you, waiting for you".

en.name: Elektronik's flash drive
en.description: A flash drive Elektronik used to write the crashed plane crew's conversations. A very valuable piece of intel.

en.name: Flash drive for ARRS station
en.description: A flash drive containing data recorded in the ARRS station server room. It's best to return it to Mechanic.

en.name: Crashed plane's flight recorder
en.description: A flight recorder found at the plane that crashed in the Priozersk nature reserve. This device is crucial to figuring out what happened to the plane.

en.name: Sacred Amulet from RB-BK
en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.

en.name: Military flash drive with topographic intel
en.description: A military flash drive containing the full set of topographic reconnaissance materials. Lucky is the one who gets their hands on it.

en.name: Decrypted Sliderkey flash drive marked with A.P.
en.description: A decrypted flash drive containing data belonging to a certain "A.P.". Includes various technical files. The word "Unheard" appears intermittently in the code, but the code itself doesn’t function or run anything.

en.name: Secure container Alpha-1 with TerraGroup evidence
en.description: A small container holding all the documents and audio tapes containing compromising material on TerraGroup. Now they’re guaranteed to reach Mr. Kerman intact.

en.name: Sacred Amulet from the abandoned factory
en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.

en.name: Sacred Amulet from RB-VO
en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.

en.name: Sacred Amulet from RB-PKPM
en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.

en.description: An amulet used by the cultists in their rituals. It seems they forgot to return it to Lightkeeper.
